melee_weapons.name: Dagger
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's ; Enemy armor: +1 ; Criticals: unarmed

melee_weapons.name: Axe, pick or warhammer
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's ; Enemy armor: -1 ; Criticals: slashing

melee_weapons.name: Two-handed hammer/mace
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +2 (first round) / +1 (subsequent) ; Two-handed ; Concussion ; Parry (6+) ; Criticals: bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Two-handed flail
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +2 (first round) / +1 (subsequent) ; Two-handed ; Concussion ; No Parry ; Criticals: bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Two-handed axe/pick/warhammer
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +2 / +1 ; Two-handed ; Enemy armor: -1 ; Parry (6+) ; Criticals: slashing

melee_weapons.name: Two-handed sword
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +2 / +1 ; Two-handed ; Parry (5+) ; Criticals: slashing

melee_weapons.name: Morning Star
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +1 (first round) / User's (subsequent) ; Enemy armor: -1 ; Main ; Criticals: bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Halberd
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's +1 ; Two-handed ; Parry (5+) ; Criticals: polearm

melee_weapons.name: Spear
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's ; +1 to Damage roll ; Main ; Criticals: polearm

melee_weapons.name: Steel Whip
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's ; Initiative (+1) ; No Parry ; Criticals: slashing

melee_weapons.name: Battle Claws
melee_weapons.description: Pair (takes both hands) ; +1 Attack ; Climbing (+1) ; Parry (5+/5+) ; Criticals: unarmed

melee_weapons.name: Squig Goad
melee_weapons.description: Main ; +1 to Damage roll ; Handler (Squigs up to 12") ; Criticals: polearm

melee_weapons.name: Dwarf Axe
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User's ; Armor: -1 ; Parry (5+) ; Criticals: slashing

ranged_weapons.name: Crossbow
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 30 inches; Strength: 4; Move or fire

ranged_weapons.name: Sling
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 18 inches; Strength: 3; Two shots (at close range without movement)

ranged_weapons.name: Throwing Stars and Knives
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 6 inches; Strength: User's; Thrown (not in combat)

ranged_weapons.name: Crossbow Pistols
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 10 inches; Strength: 4; Close combat (extra weapon / 2 attacks in 1st round)

ranged_weapons.name: Blowpipe
ranged_weapons.description: Range 8" ; Strength 1 ; Armor +1 ; Poison (Black Lotus) ; Silent (can fire from hiding)

ranged_weapons.name: Pistols
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 6 inches; Strength: 4; Enemy armor: -1 ; Close combat

ranged_weapons.name: Duelling Pistols
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 10 inches; Strength: 4; Enemy armor: -1 ; Close combat ; Accuracy (+1 hit)

ranged_weapons.name: Blunderbuss
ranged_weapons.description: Range: Special (line 16") ; Strength 3 ; Reload ; Hits everyone under the line

ranged_weapons.name: Handgun
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 24 inches ; Strength: 4 ; Enemy armor: -1 ; Move or fire

ranged_weapons.name: Hunting Rifle
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 48 inches ; Strength: 4 ; Enemy armor: -1 ; Move or fire ; Target selection (any seen)

armor.name: Shield
armor.description: Armor 5+ (or +1 to armor) ; Parry (4+) ; Improvised blow (dagger) ; Clumsy (-1 I)

armor.name: Buckler
armor.description: Armor 5+ (or +1 to melee armor) ; Parry (4+) ; Improvised blow (dagger)

armor.name: Helmet
armor.description: Stun protection (roll 4+ turns it into Knocked Down)

equipment_ogre.name: Ogre Two-handed Weapon
equipment_ogre.description: Can be used as 'Strongman' (+2 S) or 'Giant' (one-handed)

equipment_ogre.name: Deck Cannon
equipment_ogre.description: Ball (24", S5, k3 damage rolls) or Case Shot (18", S3, area 2") ; Armor -1 ; Reload ; Maintenance 10gc

equipment_ogre.name: Ogre Shield
equipment_ogre.description: Armor 5+ (or +1 to armor) ; Parry (4+) ; Improvised blow (dagger) ; Clumsy (-1 I)

items.name: Black Lotus
items.description: Automatically wounds on a hit roll of 6.

items.name: Garlic
items.description: Vampire charging the possessor must pass a Ld test.

items.name: Holy Water
items.description: Automatically inflicts 1 wound on Undead/Possessed without an armor roll.

items.name: Hammer Consecration
items.description: Adds 'Holy' trait: +1 Strength in attacks against Possessed and Undead.

items.name: Bugman's Ale
items.description: Makes the entire warband immune to Fear until the end of the skirmish.

items.name: Cathayan Silk Cloak
items.description: Reroll the first failed Rout test.

items.name: Crimson Shade
items.description: +k3 Initiative, +1 Move, +1 Strength for the duration of the skirmish.

items.name: Lantern
items.description: +4 inches to the detection range of hidden models.

items.name: Dark Venom
items.description: Weapon counts as having +1 Strength.

items.name: Elf Cloak
items.description: Shooting at the model is at a -1 penalty to Hit.

items.name: Leather Cloak
items.description: Adds +1 to Armor roll against ranged attacks.

items.name: Healing Herbs
items.description: Restores all lost Wounds in the Recovery phase.

items.name: Net
items.description: Range 8" ; Thrown ; Entanglement (Strength test for the target).

items.name: Holy (Cursed) Relic
items.description: Possessor automatically passes their first Ld test in the skirmish.

items.name: Holy Book
items.description: +1 to the roll result when attempting to cast a prayer.

items.name: Hunting Arrows
items.description: Adds +1 to the Damage roll for bows.

items.name: Lucky Charm
items.description: On 4+, negates the first hit on the model.

items.name: Mad Cap Mushrooms
items.description: Model is subject to Frenzy rules. After combat roll k6 (1 = permanently Stupid).

items.name: Mandrake Root
items.description: +1 Toughness, treats Stun as Knocked Down.

items.name: Map of Ruins
items.description: Allows choosing a scenario or rerolling an exploration die.

items.name: Superior Powder
items.description: Black powder weapon counts as having +1 Strength.

items.name: Tears of Shallaya
items.description: Possessor becomes immune to the effects of all poisons.

items.name: Book of Magic
items.description: Automatically adds one random spell.

items.name: Kislevite Vodka
items.description: +1 Ld for all models in the warband for the duration of the skirmish.
